---
title: Support
---

If you get stuck while following the manual, here is where to turn.

## Get help

- **Submission pipeline, server, or data-archive issues:** [bp-ops](mailto:{{< var email.helpdesk >}}) — the WP2 team that operates the servers hosting the BigPicture datasets you submit to.
- **General and technical support:** [servicedesk](mailto:{{< var email.servicedesk >}}).

## When you ask, include

To get a useful answer quickly, tell us:

- Which **manual step** you were on — the letter and name, e.g. *F. TLS + credentials* — and the exact command you ran.
- The **output you got** versus what the *Verify* box said to expect.
- Your **operating system** (Windows / macOS / Linux).

## Out of scope

Support covers the submission pipeline itself. Custom data transformations and
your own infrastructure setup are outside what the helpdesk can troubleshoot.
